content:
A small milestone, but a much greater responsibility.

Grateful to share that I have successfully cleared the All India Bar Examination (AIBE-XXI). This achievement is more than just qualifying for the next step in my legal journey—it is a reminder of the commitment, integrity, and responsibility that the legal profession demands.

Every milestone brings new opportunities to learn, grow, and serve with purpose. I look forward to embracing the challenges ahead with dedication, humility, and a constant desire to uphold the values of justice and the rule of law.

Here’s to the journey ahead.
